title: oxera candelabrum
intro: Oxera candelabrum is a flowering plant species in the mint family, Lamiaceae, native to New Caledonia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Oxera candelabrum include its ability to alleviate stomach pain, diarrhea, and nausea, as well as its antimicrobial properties. Oxera candelabrum can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
